name: Unsupervised Evaluation of Deep Audio Embeddings for Music Structure Analysis

description: arXiv:2603.27218v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Music Structure Analysis (MSA) aims to uncover the high-level organization of musical pieces. State-of-the-art methods are often based on supervised deep learning, but these methods are bottlenecked by the need for heavily annotated data and inherent structural ambiguities. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised evaluation of nine ope...
author: Axel Marmoret
